wafv2.rulegroup.singleheader.CfnAbout:
Inspect one of the headers in the web request, identified by name, for example, `User-Agent` or `Referer`. The name isn't case sensitive.

You can filter and inspect all headers with the `FieldToMatch` setting `Headers`.

This is used to indicate the web request component to inspect, in the [FieldToMatch](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-wafv2-rulegroup-xssmatchstatement.html

wafv2.rulegroup.singleheader.Name.Description: The name of the query header to inspect.
